text: There is an eerie stillness here that makes me feel both curious and slightly unsettled. The cool neon glow and empty chairs suggest an absence of life, yet a sense of potential lingers. In this liminal moment, surrounded by symbols of research and development, I ponder how environments shape human innovation, and whether the energy of creation can persist even in silence. I feel like both an intruder and a witness—questioning what it means to belong in places built for ideas rather than people.
